name: BambooHR
tagline: HR software for small and medium businesses
description: BambooHR is a cloud-based HR platform designed for small and mid-size businesses. It covers employee records, onboarding, performance management, time tracking, and payroll — with a clean interface that non-HR teams can actually use.
use_cases: You're a small or mid-size US business moving off spreadsheets to manage employee records and time-off in one place
Your HR team wants structured onboarding flows so new hires complete paperwork and tasks before day one
You need performance reviews and eNPS surveys without buying a separate engagement tool
Your employees and managers need a self-service portal they can actually navigate without training
